title: The Beginning of the End
theme: The end starts before anyone recognizes it.
sceneDescription: The beginning of the end is dusk before anyone names it, quiet and heavy at the edge of goodbye.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
privacySafeTreatment: Use symbolic environments, silhouettes, partial presence, hands, shadows, reflections, and objects; do not create photorealistic faces.
futureAssetNote: Future artwork slot: stylized watercolor literary-manga / visual-novel scene, privacy-safe, consistent character presence, no photorealistic identity replication.
characterTreatment: Consistent anime-inspired / soft literary-manga memoir characters: Arjun and Maya / Manne use reusable silhouettes, partial profiles, hands, reflections, and neutral clothing unless the manuscript supports a specific detail. No photorealistic faces or identity replication.
